message:
refactor(gateway): improve context rotation and logger reliability

context-rotation.ts:
- Improve rotation timing and edge case handling
- Better error recovery during context switches

logger.ts:
- Enhance structured logging output
- Add additional context fields for debugging

authorization.ts:
- Minor improvements to WebSocket authorization logic
- Better error handling for edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
